title: Noland Enters the Legend
description: Noland confronts the village’s disease and superstition, challenging the sacrifices that have shaped Shandora’s fear.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene focuses on Calgara, Mont Blanc Noland, Musse, Shandia villager, Shandia warrior. Noland confronts the village’s disease and superstition, challenging the sacrifices that have shaped Shandora’s fear.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Don't you underestimate us warriors of Shandora.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: For the crime of transpassing and decide...

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Your death alone will not be enough!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Noland
dialogue.text: For all the researchers and explorers...

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Do you think you're god or something!?

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: I will not run. promise you,

summary: Noland confronts the village’s disease and superstition, challenging the sacrifices that have shaped Shandora’s fear.
